description.ko: 무중력 액체 환경에서 유기적 막을 통해 흐르는 황금빛의 리드미컬한 교환에 초점을 맞춘 AURA-7 내부 생명력의 거시적 시각 탐구.
description.en: A macro-visual exploration of AURA-7's internal life, focusing on the rhythmic exchange of golden light through organic membranes in a weightless liquid environment.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Osmotic Cathedral.' A colossal, pulsating architectural organism composed of #7FB069 emerald moss-membranes and #2D5A3D deep forest vascular networks. The structure is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid, exhaling thick, viscous ribbons of #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar that flow like liquid silk through semi-permeable cellular walls. Macro focus on the intricate internal exchange of glowing sap within translucent capillary systems. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution.
